p2p_enrich.notes: CI commands found in repo: composer validate, composer lint, composer audit, ./vendor/bin/phpstan analyse. Tests added to TestRepoCI class: test_repo_composer_validate, test_repo_lint_request_php, test_repo_lint_worker_message_php, test_repo_lint_create_php, test_repo_phpstan_request_php, test_repo_phpstan_worker_message_php, test_repo_phpstan_create_php. All p2p tests use subprocess.run() with origin: repo_tests. Docker build failed due to php:8.3-cli-slim not accessible - requires validate agent fix.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py: removed incorrect escape sequences in two assertions that were causing test failures. Removed rubric section from eval_manifest.yaml since tests already verify all criteria.
